mapper.insert: INSERT INTO game_participations (member_id, game_id, return_rate, game_rank, earned_score, post_score, earned_cash, post_cash, entered_at) VALUES (#{gameParticipation.memberId}, #{gameParticipation.gameId}, #{gameParticipation.returnRate}, #{gameParticipation.gameRank}, #{gameParticipation.earnedScore}, #{gameParticipation.postScore}, #{gameParticipation.earnedCash}, #{gameParticipation.postCash}, #{gameParticipation.enteredAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, email, nickname, cash, total_score FROM members WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id FROM games ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, member_id, game_id, return_rate, game_rank, earned_score, post_score, earned_cash, post_cash, entered_at FROM game_participations WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE cash, total_score FROM members WHERE id = #{id}
